runTitle: Cloud Run Gemini Vision Answer Quality Smoke
coveredSurfaces: Cloud Run direct /api/ai/supervisor vision image analysis
Gemini answer grounding for dashboard screenshot current values and forecast deltas

artifacts.label: Vision smoke input screenshot
artifacts.note: Existing dashboard screenshot reused for non-counting targeted Gemini-only vision quality smoke.

artifacts.label: Gemini vision quality smoke JSON result
artifacts.note: Direct Cloud Run script result containing provider, latency, response preview, and exact-value quality checks.

completedImprovements.title: Gemini Vision routes correctly and reads current dashboard values
completedImprovements.evidence: HTTP 200, success=true, finalAgent=Vision Agent, provider=gemini, model=gemini-2.5-flash-lite. Response identified cache-redis-dc1-01, CPU 71%, memory 92%, disk 21%, CPU/memory high, disk normal, and actionable memory remediation.

wontFixImprovements.title: Gemini Vision misattributes exact forecast delta values in the screenshot
wontFixImprovements.evidence: The screenshot shows CPU +9.7%, memory +6.6%, disk +3.3%. Gemini returned CPU 71% unchanged, memory +9.7%, disk +3.3%, so exact forecast-delta attribution is not reliable from OCR alone.
wontFixImprovements.note: For exact numeric forecast answers, route to deterministic metric data/tool evidence instead of relying on image OCR.
wontFixImprovements.policyNote: 포트폴리오 운영성 우선 규칙: 비차단 항목은 과도한 개선을 방지하기 위해 WONT-FIX 처리합니다.

notes: Manual-only Vision QA: one Gemini call only, no GLM fallback call and no provider matrix.
Gemini runtime routing is healthy in the current production deployment: finalAgent=Vision Agent, mode=multi, modeSelectionSource=vision_input.
Current values are grounded correctly: cache-redis-dc1-01, CPU 71%, memory 92%, disk 21%, CPU/memory high, disk normal.
Exact forecast-delta attribution is partially wrong. This is a Vision answer-quality limitation, not a routing failure.
The providers endpoint in current production still lists Z.AI Vision fallback because the Gemini-only code change has not been deployed yet. Local code/tests remove that metadata and runtime path.
